title: All impls: CCP multi-channel rendezvous
description: After i9r0.2 and da2q.3 pass, implement CCP v1 multi-channel support in Python, Rust, and Zephyr: versioned local regional plans, channel-aware radio APIs, signed per-hop CHANNEL_REQUEST/GRANT/REJECT, bounded retune/expiry behavior, CH0 priority/fallback, scheduled channel cells, explicit single/parallel receiver limits, and per-regulatory-group airtime accounting. Do not implement persistent RX_CHANNEL announcements, blind gateway scanning, LoRaWAN uplink/downlink assumptions, or a fixed capacity multiplier.
design: Implement spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md exactly from canonical vectors and simulator evidence. A radio occupies one channel unless explicit deployed hardware advertises parallel chains.
acceptance_criteria: Cross-implementation vectors match; all CCP-16 gates remain green; Linux Zephyr and host tests pass; prohibited channels never transmit; rendezvous loss recovers to CH0 within five seconds; receiver concurrency never exceeds hardware capability.
notes: Production implementation is blocked until both project-LICHEN-i9r0.2 and project-LICHEN-da2q.3 pass the canonical CCP-16 simulator gates.
